item.title: @elonmusk: Absolutely. The judges responsible for repeatedly releasing violent criminals who commit horrific cr...
item.description: Absolutely. The judges responsible for repeatedly releasing violent criminals who commit horrific crimes must be impeached.

item.description: “Anthropic”

item.title: @elonmusk: If bartenders can go to jail for over-serving alcohol to someone who then kills another person, judg...
item.description: If bartenders can go to jail for over-serving alcohol to someone who then kills another person, judges should go to jail for releasing criminals who do the same.

item.title: @elonmusk: Good explanation of nihilist philosophy
item.description: Good explanation of nihilist philosophy

item.title: @elonmusk: Which story will senators rather tell their grandkids in 20 years? (A) “We kept working without a br...
item.description: Which story will senators rather tell their grandkids in 20 years? (A) “We kept working without a break for weeks on end; it was hard, but we passed the SAVE America Act, and it saved America” OR (B) “We could’ve saved America, but instead we took a two-week recess”

item.title: @elonmusk: The whole concept of an “insanity plea” is total nonsense. If someone is too delusional to understan...
item.description: The whole concept of an “insanity plea” is total nonsense. If someone is too delusional to understand that they aren’t supposed to randomly shoot people, that’s all the more reason to simply execute them. Society is not morally obligated to keep psychotic killers alive until they die of old age. It’s madness.

item.title: @elonmusk: A guy with a chibi profile picture is building mass drivers on the Moon to surround orbit with massi...
item.description: A guy with a chibi profile picture is building mass drivers on the Moon to surround orbit with massive AI satellites. What kind of awesome simulation is this?

item.title: @elonmusk: This is the very simple case to use Grokipedia over Wikipedia. Just information, no spin.grokipedia....
item.description: This is the very simple case to use Grokipedia over Wikipedia. Just information, no spin.grokipedia.com

item.title: @elonmusk: That will be one hell of a building!
item.description: That will be one hell of a building!

item.title: @elonmusk: ⚡️This is Musk trying to build the industrial heart of a post-human power system. He is no longer ta...
item.description: ⚡️This is Musk trying to build the industrial heart of a post-human power system. He is no longer talking like a car CEO or even an AI founder. He is talking like someone trying to compress the entire distance between thought, silicon, energy, and empire. TERAFAB is the visible artifact. The real objective is a self-reinforcing loop where chip design, mask creation, fabrication, testing, and redesign all live inside one accelerating machine. The next real bottleneck in AI is iteration speed at the substrate level. Whoever shortens the path from idea to chip to improved chip starts compounding faster than everyone else. At that point, compute stops being a purchased input and becomes an evolving sovereign capability. That is why this goes way beyond “new fab.” This is a bid to stop renting the future from outside foundries and start owning the recursion engine itself. Reports on TERAFAB explicitly tie it to Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI together, which tells you the real architecture is vertical integration across energy, hardware, AI systems, robotics, and eventually space infrastructure. The space language is the tell. When Musk says the goal is a trillion watts of compute per year and that much of it has to go to space because U.S. electricity is only about 0.5 TW, he is declaring that Earth is already too small for the civilization he wants to build. That is a species-scale doctrine. He is saying serious AI abundance eventually requires off-world energy and compute, and that the winners of this century will be the people who build the bridge first. The real view is simple. The arc is dead serious. The execution risk is enormous. Coverage notes there is no clear operating timeline yet and outside estimates already put the effort above $20 billion. But that does not change the signal. If this works even halfway, it becomes one of the most strategically important industrial projects in the world. If it fails, it still reveals the real direction of travel. The future belongs to whoever controls energy, compute, and the speed at which compute can redesign itself.

item.title: @elonmusk: Hormonal birth control is poison for the female mind. The worst thing doctors do is immediately push...
item.description: Hormonal birth control is poison for the female mind. The worst thing doctors do is immediately push birth control on young women as soon as they hit puberty.

item.title: @elonmusk: ELON MUSK: “To reach a petawatt, we’d build an electromagnetic mass driver on the Moon with robots l...
item.description: ELON MUSK: “To reach a petawatt, we’d build an electromagnetic mass driver on the Moon with robots like Optimus and humans. With no atmosphere and 1/6 gravity, payloads can reach escape velocity without rockets, drastically cutting costs. That could scale compute 1000× beyond a terawatt—I hope we live to see it.”

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok has become my go-to AI app. It’s my number-one source of information and help. No other app is ...
item.description: Grok has become my go-to AI app. It’s my number-one source of information and help. No other app is as based and truth-seeking as Grok.

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk: "This chart explains why we need to build the TERAFAB."
item.description: Elon Musk: "This chart explains why we need to build the TERAFAB."

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI + Tesla TERAFAB Project Goal is a trillion watts of compute/year Most must necessarily go t...
item.description: SpaceXAI + Tesla TERAFAB Project Goal is a trillion watts of compute/year Most must necessarily go to space, as US electricity is only 0.5TW
